creator: laszlof@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA256

Sorry, I did not review the first list of ports I submitted (grep'd for
X11BASE in pkg-plist) There are a number of them which would not be
applicable. Most of which make @exec and @unexec calls to applications
within X11BASE.

As for the 1551 ports that are installed into X11BASE, I believe that a
gradual move before XOrg would be beneficial, otherwise these ports will
be BROKEN when Xorg is moved, and cause us to rush out patches to get
them in the proper location. With the addition of X_PLIST_*, we will be
able to simply propagate the files back into pkg-plist or PLIST_* after
Xorg has been moved, with little or no problems. @cwd in the plist will
do this, but applications that could otherwise use PLIST_* would not be
able to, because there is currently no implementation of @cwd in PLIST_*.
- --
- -----------------------------
Frank J. Laszlo
laszlof@FreeBSD.org
